query:
SELECT 
  c.code, 
  COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
WHERE c.code IN ('DIV102', 'LED202', 'DIV111', 'DIV112', 'DIV113')
GROUP BY c.id, c.code
ORDER BY c.code;
